text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She was pretty good in the February Stakes, but
what are the odds of her actually winning today?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
If she does manage to win and follow through on
her declaration, I'd say she's the real deal. I guess
we'll see...

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text: Sorry, couldn't help but overhear your conversation, and let me tell you—Falco is the real deal! Have you seen all her races?!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text:
If you haven't, then take a look at this! It's an
official montage of all her races.

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text: Right?! Here, now check her out onstage!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Um, sorry to bother you, but... I'm looking
forward to running with you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The younger students are super nice. Look at
them, taking the time to say hello! ☆
choice_data_list: Well, aren't you quite the matriarch.
Well, aren't you quite the matriarch.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Now, hold on a second! I'm still young and spry!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I do have a lot of experience, being in
senior year and all.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about how it's up to me to
blaze a trail for the next generation.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
A trail that younger runners will want to follow all
the way out here, onto the dirt.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I want to make a reality where everyone dreams of racing on dirt.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win this for all the younger students
who look up to me!
